content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify atom C:19 (carbon with index 19) and its neighboring atoms. Let me analyze the connections:

Atom C:19 is connected to:
- C:31 (carbon) - to the upper left
- C:20 (carbon) - below and to the left  
- N:17 (nitrogen) - to the right
- H:35 (hydrogen) - above and to the right

I can confirm these are all covalently bonded neighbors of atom 19.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file naming convention in the working directory, I can see "geomconf_5431.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 5431.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 19 (C) are:
- Atom 31 (C)
- Atom 20 (C)
- Atom 17 (N)
- Atom 35 (H)

Geomconf_index: 5431

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 19, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
